headline: BMO Capital Initiates Coverage On Emerson Electric with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $150
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Daniel DiCicco   initiates coverage on Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $150.
